title: JORNADAS
description: A Vanilla+ ModPack where you can thrill an awesome journey.
body:
Embark on an exciting adventure with JORNADAS, a carefully curated Minecraft modpack that enhances your gameplay with immersive features, quality-of-life improvements, and thrilling challenges. Whether you're an explorer, builder, or adventurer, this modpack is designed to suit all playstyles while maintaining the spirit of Minecraft.

🌟 Key Features:
Exploration and Adventure: Discover new biomes, dungeons, and dimensions filled with unique mobs, treasures, and challenges. Mods like Deeper and Darker and The Aether bring a fresh twist to familiar terrains.
Building and Creativity: Expand your architectural potential with mods such as Supplementaries, offering countless new decorative blocks and functional designs.
Quality-of-Life Enhancements: Enjoy a seamless experience with mods like Traveler's Backpack and Xaero's Minimap, which make managing resources and navigation a breeze.
Combat and Progression: Engage in strategic battles with enhanced weapons and combat mechanics provided by Vic's Point Blank.
Custom Configurations: JORNADAS is tailored to ensure balanced progression and smooth integration between all included mods.

🌍 Multiplayer-Ready:
Play solo or with friends! This modpack includes mods like Simple Voice Chat to enhance multiplayer interaction and coordination.

⚙️ Performance Optimizations:
Experience smooth gameplay with Sodium and Lithium for performance optimization and minimal lag, even on lower-end PCs.

🎨 Why "JORNADAS"?
The name "JORNADAS" reflects the adventurous spirit and limitless possibilities this modpack offers. It’s all about embarking on new jornadas (journeys in portuguese), building epic creations, and thriving in a dynamic Minecraft world.
